sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import {
  Container,
  Grid,
  Card,
  CardContent,
  CardMedia,
  Typography,
  Button,
  Box,
  AppBar,
  Toolbar,
  IconButton,
  Badge,
  TextField,
  InputAdornment,
  Chip,
  Menu,
  MenuItem,
  Drawer,
  List,
  ListItem,
  ListItemIcon,
  ListItemText,
  Divider,
} from '@mui/material';
import {
  ShoppingCart,
  Search,
  AccountCircle,
  Logout,
  FilterList,
  Category,
  LocalShipping,
  VerifiedUser,
  Store,
} from '@mui/icons-material';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { motion } from 'framer-motion';

const products = [
  {
    id: 1,
    name: 'Rau cải thìa hữu cơ',
    price: 35000,
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1594282486552-05b4d80fbb9f',
    origin: 'Đà Lạt',
    supplier: 'Nông trại hữu cơ Đà Lạt',
    certification: 'VietGAP',
    rating: 4.5,
    reviews: 128,
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    name: 'Thịt bò Wagyu A5',
    price: 1850000,
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1603048588665-791ca8f5b83a',
    origin: 'Nhật Bản',
    supplier: 'Nhà phân phối thịt bò cao cấp',
    certification: 'Wagyu Certificate',
    rating: 5.0,
    reviews: 89,
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    name: 'Cá hồi tươi Na Uy',
    price: 450000,
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1519708227418-c8fd9a32b7a2',
    origin: 'Na Uy',
    supplier: 'Hải sản Hoàng Gia',
    certification: 'ASC',
    rating: 4.8,
    reviews: 156,
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    name: 'Gạo ST25',
    price: 85000,
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1586201375761-83865001e31c',
    origin: 'Đồng bằng sông Cửu Long',
    supplier: 'HTX Nông nghiệp sạch',
    certification: 'Global GAP',
    rating: 4.7,
    reviews: 234,
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    name: 'Tôm sú tươi',
    price: 550000,
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1565680018434-b513d5e5fd47',
    origin: 'Cà Mau',
    supplier: 'Hải sản Miền Tây',
    certification: 'ASC',
    rating: 4.6,
    reviews: 167,
  },
  {
    id: 6,
    name: 'Nấm hương hữu cơ',
    price: 120000,
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1611531944937-f43f0fdc2d36',
    origin: 'Lâm Đồng',
    supplier: 'Nông trại nấm sạch',
    certification: 'Organic',
    rating: 4.4,
    reviews: 98,
  },
];

const categories = [
  { name: 'Rau củ', icon: <Category /> },
  { name: 'Thịt', icon: <Store /> },
  { name: 'Hải sản', icon: <LocalShipping /> },
  { name: 'Gạo & Ngũ cốc', icon: <VerifiedUser /> },
];

const Home: React.FC = () => {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [anchorEl, setAnchorEl] = useState<null | HTMLElement>(null);
  const [isFilterDrawerOpen, setIsFilterDrawerOpen] = useState(false);
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');

  const handleProductClick = (id: number) => {
    navigate(`/product/${id}`);
  };

  const handleProfileMenuOpen = (event: React.MouseEvent<HTMLElement>) => {
    setAnchorEl(event.currentTarget);
  };

  const handleMenuClose = () => {
    setAnchorEl(null);
  };

  const toggleFilterDrawer = () => {
    setIsFilterDrawerOpen(!isFilterDrawerOpen);
  };

  return (
    <Box sx={{ flexGrow: 1 }}>
      <AppBar position="fixed">
        <Toolbar>
          <Typography
            variant="h6"
            component="div"
            sx={{ display: { xs: 'none', sm: 'block' } }}
          >
            FoodTrace
          </Typography>
          <Box sx={{ flexGrow: 1, mx: 2 }}>
            <TextField
              fullWidth
              size="small"
              placeholder="Tìm kiếm sản phẩm..."
              value={searchTerm}
              onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
              InputProps={{
                startAdornment: (
                  <InputAdornment position="start">
                    <Search />
                  </InputAdornment>
                ),
                sx: { bgcolor: 'white', borderRadius: 1 },
              }}
            />
          </Box>
          <IconButton color="inherit" onClick={toggleFilterDrawer}>
            <FilterList />
          </IconButton>
          <IconButton color="inherit">
            <Badge badgeContent={3} color="error">
              <ShoppingCart />
            </Badge>
          </IconButton>
          <IconButton color="inherit" onClick={handleProfileMenuOpen}>
            <AccountCircle />
          </IconButton>
        </Toolbar>
      </AppBar>

      <Menu
        anchorEl={anchorEl}
        open={Boolean(anchorEl)}
        onClose={handleMenuClose}
      >
        <MenuItem onClick={() => navigate('/profile')}>Tài khoản</MenuItem>
        <MenuItem onClick={() => navigate('/orders')}>Đơn hàng</MenuItem>
        <MenuItem onClick={() => navigate('/login')}>
          <Logout fontSize="small" sx={{ mr: 1 }} />
          Đăng xuất
        </MenuItem>
      </Menu>

      <Drawer
        anchor="right"
        open={isFilterDrawerOpen}
        onClose={toggleFilterDrawer}
      >
        <Box sx={{ width: 250, p: 2 }}>
          <Typography variant="h6" gutterBottom>
            Danh mục
          </Typography>
          <List>
            {categories.map((category) => (
              <ListItem button key={category.name}>
                <ListItemIcon>{category.icon}</ListItemIcon>
                <ListItemText primary={category.name} />
              </ListItem>
            ))}
          </List>
          <Divider />
          <Typography variant="h6" gutterBottom sx={{ mt: 2 }}>
            Chứng nhận
          </Typography>
          <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: 1 }}>
            <Chip label="VietGAP" onClick={() => {}} />
            <Chip label="Global GAP" onClick={() => {}} />
            <Chip label="Organic" onClick={() => {}} />
            <Chip label="ASC" onClick={() => {}} />
          </Box>
        </Box>
      </Drawer>

      <Container sx={{ mt: 10, mb: 4 }}>
        <Grid container spacing={3}>
          {products.map((product) => (
            <Grid item key={product.id} xs={12} sm={6} md={4}>
              <motion.div
                whileHover={{ scale: 1.03 }}
                transition={{ duration: 0.2 }}
              >
                <Card
                  sx={{ height: '100%', cursor: 'pointer' }}
                  onClick={() => handleProductClick(product.id)}
                >
                  <CardMedia
                    component="img"
                    height="200"
                    image={product.image}
                    alt={product.name}
                    sx={{ objectFit: 'cover' }}
                  />
                  <CardContent>
                    <Typography gutterBottom variant="h6" component="div">
                      {product.name}
                    </Typography>
                    <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', mb: 1 }}>
                      <Typography
                        variant="body2"
                        color="text.secondary"
                        sx={{ mr: 1 }}
                      >
                        {product.rating}★
                      </Typography>
                      <Typography variant="body2" color="text.secondary">
                        ({product.reviews})
                      </Typography>
                    </Box>
                    <Typography variant="body2" color="text.secondary" gutterBottom>
                      Xuất xứ: {product.origin}
                    </Typography>
                    <Typography variant="body2" color="text.secondary" gutterBottom>
                      Nhà cung cấp: {product.supplier}
                    </Typography>
                    <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', mt: 2 }}>
                      <Typography variant="h6" color="primary">
                        {product.price.toLocaleString('vi-VN')} VNĐ
                      </Typography>
                      <Chip
                        label={product.certification}
                        color="success"
                        size="small"
                      />
                    </Box>
                  </CardContent>
                </Card>
              </motion.div>
            </Grid>
          ))}
        </Grid>
      </Container>
    </Box>
  );
};

export default Home;
